entries.current_position: RP-C07 is COMPLETE. The obsolete fresh-origin premise is superseded; CAP-015 and AJ-01 are proven from Athena Spear PR #39 and RP-C01-M02 from Phoenix Blade PR #50. Athena routes are Spear to Thread Engine, Phoenix Blade without Thread Engine, and Aegis Break; Jayson/Artemis use Arrow/Bow, and Jayson uses Oathbringer. Counts: 14 RESTORED, 7 IMPROVED, 4 PRESERVED, 1 REPLACED, 1 INTENTIONALLY_RETIRED, 0 BLOCKED, 1 STILL_MISSING. AJ-03/AJ-11/AJ-12 UNPROVEN; RP-C01, RP-C08, Repairing Prime IN_PROGRESS.
blockers: RP-C01-M06 protected-path handoff detection is proven, but protected execution was not run.
RP-C01-M07 and AJ-03 require a genuine non-owner with legitimate workflow-dispatch permission to produce OWNER_IDENTITY_REJECTED with exact no-mutation evidence.
CAP-027 remains missing while AJ-03, AJ-11, and AJ-12 are UNPROVEN.
AJ-11 requires clean-clone recovery, deterministic regeneration, rollback classification, and no-Codex-dependency readback at final RP-C08 main.
AJ-12 requires complete Ubuntu and Windows validation at final merged RP-C08 main.
Final whole-Quest Strikeforce, Phoenix recovery, Quest Board closeout, generated readback, and restart-safe Sunset remain unfinished.
entries.next_action: Complete only the remaining protected execution, genuine non-owner rejection, CAP-027, final clean-clone, final merged-main validation, generated readback, whole-Quest Strikeforce, Phoenix recovery, Quest Board closeout, and Sunset gates.
entries.next_approval: Protected execution, genuine non-owner participation, final Quest closure, and permanence retain separate Jayson authority.
